heading: Meet Tequila
description1:
At Tequilia Mockingbirds our goal is simple: to deliver a bespoke experience that is effortlessly enjoyable. 

We have reimagined the classic frozen margarita and given it a fresh wellness-inspired twist. 

Founders Carrie and Emma, have backgrounds rooted in health and well-being. Together, they have created a unique cocktail menu by taking a holistic approach focussing on only using the good stuff. 

TM’s frozen margaritas are designed to be cleaner, lighter and balanced.  We use 100% premium blue agave tequila, natural syrups along with feel-good ingredients such as kombucha and kefir water. 

No more artificial nonsense. Just good clean fun!
description2:
Whether you are hosting a corporate event or want to bring festival energy to your private party or celebration. 
Enquire today to discover how our frozen margaritas can be tailored to your occasion.
